This is a great game. I realy like the swigging but it does take a bit to get used to and I like that you can run and kill titans, but after playing for a while then getting off you used up your stamina for the day to you can’t play until the next day which you can get infinite stamina with the battle pass. I am fine with this game having a battle pass. The stuff you mainly get is cosmetics, but there are 4 thing that are not. Sword the spiderman, double speed boost, sword for titans, and armor for titans. Me and many other people wish Taht the armor and swords for the titans can’t bolth be quipped at the same time. The swords give you almost double the range while armor makes you invincible which can be vary unfair to the spiders and makes the game feel very unfair. I also think the same thing for spiders where you can either have the speed boost or longer blades bro bolth. Besides that it’s a really good game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! I will consider your advice.

reviews.review_title: Why does this have good reviews?
reviews.review_description: All this is is just a poorly made gorilla tag clone. Physics are janky constantly getting stuck. Rope physics are bad. Do not get
It’s just another toxic  game for bullying, racist, and verbal sexual assault.

I liked the game earlier around Christmas, but ever since the battle pass got implemented every time I play it seems like someone has the battle pass. The problem with the battle pass is that it’s basically pay to win, you get long ranged swords, rocket launchers that let you load a ton of rockets in one, armor that pretty much makes you invincible and ropes that make you go faster then the average character. That’s just scratching the surface. I recommend that you fix this or this could lead to you losing players.
It’s a good game though, but it gets a little repetitive
